free_text: Some U-238 fission yields for 14.4 MeV neutrons

sample, irradiated between two Al foils 0.1 mm thick
Irr. time 30 h. Measurements were repeated
within the time interval of 150 days.

chemical separation or applying the recoil effect.
Determination of the gamma intensities as well as the
analysis of decay curves were performed using computer

The yields presented in the table below are the direct
